gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID INNER JOIN Examination AS T3 ON T1.ID = T3.ID WHERE T2.PT < 14 AND T3.Thrombosis < 3 AND T3.Thrombosis > 0
pred_sql:
SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) 
FROM Examination AS T1
JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE (T1.Thrombosis = 1 OR T1.Thrombosis = 2)
AND T2.PT < 14;
question: How many patients with severe thrombosis have a normal prothrombin time?
